title: Luffy and Nami Are Taken Prisoner
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Jinbe, Reiju, Pudding, Nami, Luffy, Sanji as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What the...?!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: long time no talk, straw hat Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So you've finally come this far.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: BIG MOM?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: A Trans- Powder Small?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me outta here! I need to go back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll break everything to get out of here if I need to!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mamamama ...still quite the lively one, I see!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You didn't bring along your entire crew,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I thought you had forgotten our promise back on fishman island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No! I'll definitely come to kick your ass one day!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But right now I'm just here to get Sanji back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you wanna fight, then get your ass over here, big mom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'll fight you right here and now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hahaha...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't get cheeky with me, kid. You're a mere grain of sand in the desert that just entered the new world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Haha Ha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'd better not order me around like that. How pre- sumptuous of you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: i don't even need to physically be there if i wanted you dead this instant.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you'll simply give up on Sanji, I'll let you loose this time around.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This Union between Sanji and pudding really means a lot to me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: until everything wraps up smoothly,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll have you two waiting patiently in there. But if you do anything to take away my upcoming joy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Then get ready...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: to see hell.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Do you remember? Back in fishman island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The second day I'll

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You devoured the entire batch of sweet, sweet candy that was supposed to be for me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And ended up giving me all the treasure you got from King Neptune...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Anyone knows

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: as a way of paying me back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll give you all the treasure I've got! I'm paying you back for the candy, here and now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mamamama... and what do you think was hidden in that treasure?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hahahaha... you'd better not ask for it back now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The infamous, legendary treasure box of fishman island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: known as the TAMATE- BAKO!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now why the hell did Neptune decide to let go of that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's one of those things even worthy of being called a "National Treasure"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've fallen in love with that little box... so I'm going to let go of the incident involving the candy altogether!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I'm gonna open that in front of everyone at the tea party too! Man, I'm so freaking excited!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Shut up!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Sanji ain't gonna marry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Speaking of which...

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Let me see pudding! She's my friend!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy! Don't tell her about pudding!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Your friend....?! haha...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you gone nuts? Why would the bride be friends with you, of all people?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 48 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
